title: Launch plan.
lede: What we plan in our marketing, when, and who owns what.

goals.title: Position monday.com as a key player in the AI ecosystem

expectations: Lead with the product — You're the gateway between the product and our customers and the market. Lead with the product itself, and let people see it — not just read about it.
Carry it into your customer touchpoints — July 1 is the kickoff, not the finish line — keep bringing these capabilities and the narrative into your customer touchpoints beyond launch.
Reinforce the message — Perception and discovery compound through repetition; the more your comms echo the same messages, the more they land.
